english_text: Wait for everyone to be served
Don't stick chopsticks upright in rice
Don't hold spoon and chopsticks together

korean_text: 멀리 있는 반찬은 옮겨 달라고 하세요
romanization: meolli inneun banchaneun omgyeo dallago haseyo

english_text: Don't leave the table before elders finish
Finish all the rice in your bowl
Don't fill your plate too much
Wipe your mouth with a napkin
Don't talk with food in your mouth
korean_text: 입에 음식이 있을 때 말하지 마세요
romanization: ibe eumsigi isseul ttae malhaji maseyo

english_text: Place your utensils down when done
Don't make a mess on the table
Turn down the TV during meals
Don't use your phone at the table
Take only what you can eat
Cover your mouth when using a toothpick
Say please when asking for food
Eating together is a bonding experience
